title: [WIP/RFC] ecp5: 'Fix' transparent DRAMs by putting register on address

features.name: dual_port_sram_with_transparent_read_port
features.description: Code should include a dual-port SRAM where one port is transparent (write-through) - writing to address A immediately reflects in the read output at the same address, while a second port reads from a different address

features.name: address_register_following_write_address
features.description: Code should include a pattern where a write address is captured in a register during the write operation, and the same captured address is used for an immediate read-back on a transparent memory port
